title: Intern Welcome & Networking Mixer
description: Kick off the summer by meeting fellow interns, mentors, and division leaders.

title: Lunch & Learn: Inside the Floyd Hill Project
description: Project engineers walk through one of CDOT’s most complex active builds.

title: Coffee Chat Speed Networking
description: Rotate through quick, friendly chats with engineers from every division.

title: Workshop: Resume & LinkedIn for Engineers
description: Hands-on help making your resume and profile stand out for technical roles.

title: Tech Talk: HEC-RAS & Bridge Scour
description: A practical intro to river modeling and how scour threatens bridges.

title: Field Tour: I-25 South Gap Construction
description: See a major interstate project up close with the field engineering team.

title: WTS Panel: Women Leaders in Transportation
description: Senior women leaders share career journeys, lessons, and advice.

title: Info Session: PE Licensure Pathway
description: Everything you need to know about the path to your PE license at CDOT.

title: Hackathon: Traffic Data Challenge
description: Team up to find insights in real traffic and safety datasets.

title: Tech Talk: Connected & Automated Vehicles
description: A look at CDOT’s connected-vehicle pilots and what comes next.

title: Career Fair: Explore CDOT Divisions
description: Visit booths from every division and discover where you fit.

title: Intern Capstone Showcase
description: Interns present their summer projects to leadership and peers.
